claim: A gate-status command shall answer, from a runtime land-log, whether a full T2 verification has landed at-or-after the most recent T1-gated land, exiting 0 (boundary satisfied) or 1 (boundary not satisfied, printing the unverified T1-gated targets) -- this is the mechanically checkable SLICE of R-tiered-gate-not-a-commit-gate's claim; it does not itself verify that a steward runs it, nor detect an imminent commit, nor replace R-tiered-gate-not-a-commit-gate's human-invoked procedural discipline.
blocked_on: blocked on the gate_status tool (Planned) + the land-log it reads (absent)
